description: invoke_configure_vault validates that the supplied path resolves to a directory but does NOT persist the vault path to settings. Per the spec pipeline diagram (behavioral-spec.md lines 96-105) and REQ-006, configure-vault must persist settings so that the subsequent invoke_app_startup() can read them back. The current Rust implementation returns Ok(json!({})) without calling settings_save or any persistence layer. Combined with FIND-401 (invoke_app_startup is a stub), the entire production startup→configure→re-startup loop is non-functional. REQ-006 AC explicitly requires '設定の永続化 (Settings.save) は Tauri command 内部で行われ、TypeScript 側で直接呼ばない' — i.e., the Rust command MUST persist. It does not.
